title: Broken link on package import when compiling RV core
body:
Hi,
when trying to compile CV32E40P RISC-V core I'm seeing an unexpected error 255.
```bash
- V3Ast.cpp:1138:     Dumping output_verilator/Vsimple_tile_002_cells.tree
%Error: Internal Error: rtl/cv32e40p/rtl/cv32e40p_id_stage.sv:31:22: ../V3Broken.cpp:253: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): !m_packagep || !m_packagep->brokeExists()
-node: PACKAGEIMPORT 0x7f9a09d825c0 <e95652> {x31aw}  * -> PACKAGE 0x7f9a19eb2270 <e314138> {e26aj}  cv32e40p_pkg  L7 [LIB] [NONE]
   31 |   import cv32e40p_pkg::*;
      |                      ^~
                        ... See the manual and https://verilator.org for more assistance.
- V3Ast.cpp:1138:     Dumping output_verilator/Vsimple_tile_990_final.tree
- V3Broken.cpp:318:   Broken called under broken, skipping recursion.
- V3StatsReport.cpp:226:statsReport:
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug
%Error: export VERILATOR_ROOT=
make: *** [output_verilator/Vsimple_tile.mk] Error 255
```
I'm adding the includes first and the packages but even though I'm seeing the error. Can you point me what's wrong with my setup?

**[Repository](https://github.com/aignacio/mpsoc_example)**
**Verilator version:** Verilator 4.106 2020-12-02 rev v4.106
